name: agent-reach
description: Windows-first research integration and orchestration suite for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Bootstraps, documents, diagnoses, and exposes thin read-only collection plus in-session orchestration skills for downstream Codex research workflows on Windows.
defaultPrompt: Show me which research channels are ready on this Windows machine.
